    Index

    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    A

    addApplicant(Applicant) - Method in class classes.VisaOfficeSystem
    Adds new applicant to the system
    addApplication(Application) - Method in class classes.VisaOfficeSystem
    adds new visa application to the system
    addVisaOfficer(Officer) - Method in class classes.VisaOfficeSystem
    Adds new officer to the system
    adminMenu(VisaOfficeSystem, Scanner) - Static method in class classes.Tester
    Handles admin operations menu.
    applicant - Variable in class classes.Application
    The applicant who owns this application, an instance of applicant class.
    Applicant - Class in classes
    Applicant class with Identification attributes
    Applicant(String, String, String, LocalDate) - Constructor for class classes.Applicant
    Constructs an applicant with parameters below:
    applicantMenu(VisaOfficeSystem, Scanner) - Static method in class classes.Tester
    Handles applicant operations menu.
    applicants - Variable in class classes.DataLoader
    List of applicants in the system
    applicants - Variable in class classes.VisaOfficeSystem
    In-memory list of all applicants
    applicantWithMostApplications() - Method in class classes.VisaOfficeSystem
    Finds and prints the applicant who has submitted the most applications
    Application - Class in classes
    Application class, abstract and father class to three other visa classes
    Application(int, LocalDate, Applicant, Status, Officer) - Constructor for class classes.Application
    Construct an application with parameters below:
    application_counter - Static variable in class classes.VisaOfficeSystem
    a counter to generate application numbers
    applicationNO - Variable in class classes.Application
    Application number
    applications - Variable in class classes.DataLoader
    List of applications in the system
    applications - Variable in class classes.VisaOfficeSystem
    In-memory list of all visa applications
    approveApplication() - Method in class classes.Application
    Sets the status to approved
    APPROVED - Enum constant in enum class classes.Status
     
    assignOfficertoApplicaton(Application, Officer) - Method in class classes.VisaOfficeSystem
    Assigns specific officer to the given application
